name: Voice Message
description: A message bubble for voice/audio messages. Displays a play/pause control, a waveform visualization, duration, and optionally an AI-generated transcript that can be viewed, expanded, or hidden.

tokens.width: fit content / fill parent (ask for container width behavior)

button.spec: Google Sans Text Medium, 14/20, tracking 0 — for View/Hide transcript button

title.spec: Google Sans Text Medium, 16/24, tracking 0 — for transcript expanded title

transcript.spec: Google Sans Text Regular, 16/24, tracking 0 — for transcript body text

variants.name: w/o transcription — Default
variants.desc: Compact pill-shaped bubble with just the play button, waveform, and duration. No transcript button.

variants.name: w/o transcription — Playing
variants.desc: Same compact layout but the play button becomes a pause button. Duration updates to current playback time.

variants.name: w/transcription — Default
variants.desc: Adds a 'View transcript' button above the play controls.

variants.name: w/transcription — Playing
variants.desc: Same as w/transcription Default but in playing state with pause icon.

variants.name: w/transcription expanded — Playing
variants.desc: Transcript fully expanded: 'Hide transcript' button + settings icon at top, then transcript body, then waveform/play controls at bottom.

behavior.interactive: Tap play button to start/pause playback. Tap 'View transcript' to expand and reveal the AI-generated transcript. Tap 'Hide transcript' to collapse back. Settings icon opens transcript preferences.
behavior.dynamic: Waveform fills from left to right as audio plays. Duration counter updates in real time. Play icon toggles between play_arrow and pause based on Status.
behavior.readReceipt: Visible only when Service=RCS AND Chat=Outgoing. Positioned at bottom-right corner.

states: Play button visible, waveform unplayed color, duration shows total length.
Pause button visible, waveform partially filled, duration shows elapsed time.
Standard M3 state layer (10% opacity) on the button.
Bubble height grows to fit transcript content with M3 easing transition.

darkMode.notes: Bubble surface swaps between light/dark surface tokens. RCS outgoing bubble uses the primary color which inverts (dark blue → light blue) between modes.

writing: Always 'View transcript' (sentence case). Label Large 14/20 Medium.
MM:SS with leading zeros (e.g. 00:05, 01:23). Label Large 14/20 Medium.
AI-generated short summary. Title Medium 16/24 Medium. Max 1 line, ellipsis.
Full transcription text. Body Large 16/24 Regular.
a11y: Transcript content aria-live='polite' for screen readers
WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1) for text, 3:1 for waveform
Tab to focus, Space/Enter to activate, arrow keys to scrub (optional)
